attr.title: SpaghettiKart
attr.desc: A source port of Mario Kart 64. It features extensive and significant enhancements over the original game, such as improved performance, increased frame-rate, native ultra-widescreen support, and extensive mod support (especially compared to emulated versions of the original), among other features.
attr.inst: Follow the guide in the readme to generate your mk64.o2r file.
